scripts.migration:create: cross-env TS_NODE_PROJECT=./tsconfig.migration.json node -r tsconfig-paths/register -r ts-node/register ./node_modules/typeorm/cli.js migration:create
scripts.migration:generate: cross-env TS_NODE_PROJECT=./tsconfig.migration.json node -r tsconfig-paths/register -r ts-node/register ./node_modules/typeorm/cli.js migration:generate -d ./src/ormconfig.ts ./src/migrations/migration
scripts.migration:run: cross-env TS_NODE_PROJECT=./tsconfig.migration.json node -r tsconfig-paths/register -r ts-node/register ./node_modules/typeorm/cli.js migration:run -d ./src/ormconfig.ts
scripts.migration:revert: cross-env TS_NODE_PROJECT=./tsconfig.migration.json node -r tsconfig-paths/register -r ts-node/register ./node_modules/typeorm/cli.js migration:revert -d ./src/ormconfig.ts
